title: S + V + N + which/that + V（限定關係子句）

formulas.zh: 名詞後接關係代名詞(which/that)及其動詞，形成限定用法，修飾並限定先行詞的範圍
名詞後接關係代名詞及其動詞和受詞，提供先行詞的具體限定訊息

explanation: 這個句型使用關係代名詞 which(事物) 或 that(人或事物) 引導限定用法之形容詞子句。該子句緊接在先行詞後，直接限定並縮小先行詞的範圍，不用逗號分隔。結構上，which/that 在子句中作主詞，後接動詞。若省略 which/that，則形成省略關係代名詞的結構。限定用法和非限定用法的主要差異在於是否用逗號分隔——限定用法無逗號，非限定用法(補充訊息)需用逗號。

examples.eng: The smartphone that you bought last month works perfectly.
examples.chi: 你上個月買的那支智慧型手機運作得完美無缺。

examples.eng: The book which won the award is displayed in the library.
examples.chi: 那本獲獎的書被展示在圖書館裡。

examples.eng: Students that study hard can achieve their dreams.
examples.chi: 那些努力讀書的學生能實現他們的夢想。

examples.eng: The policy that the government introduced last year has reduced pollution.
examples.chi: 政府去年推行的那項政策已經減少了污染。

extension.tip: 判斷限定用法的關鍵：(1)無逗號分隔；(2)子句缺少主要資訊時不可或缺，移除會改變句意；(3)用 that 時更強調限定，用 which 時較正式。常見錯誤是誤用非限定用法(加逗號)或混淆 which/that 的使用對象。

examples.test: The car which is parked outside is mine.
examples.result: → 限定用法，指「停在外面的那輛車」，範圍明確。若改為 The car, which is parked outside, is mine，則變為非限定用法，補充額外資訊。

examples.test: Students that don't submit homework will lose points.
examples.result: → 正確。該子句限定「哪些學生」(不繳交作業的)，是本句必需訊息，不可加逗號。

examples.test: The information which we received helps solve the problem.
examples.result: → 正確。which 修飾事物 information，清楚限定「我們收到的那些資訊」。

extension.note: 無逗號 + 缺子句則句意不完 = 限定用法；有逗號 + 去子句句意仍完整 = 非限定用法。

parts: serves excellent seafood dishes is located downtown.
exercises.sentence: The restaurant that serves excellent seafood dishes is located downtown.
exercises.translation: 那家提供優質海鮮菜餚的餐廳位於市中心。

parts: gave us this challenging exam is very strict.
exercises.sentence: The teacher who gave us this challenging exam is very strict.
exercises.translation: 給我們出這份困難考試的那位老師非常嚴格。

parts: addresses climate change has received international recognition.
exercises.sentence: The research that addresses climate change has received international recognition.
exercises.translation: 那項針對氣候變遷的研究獲得了國際認可。

parts: fail quality inspection must be removed from shelves.
exercises.sentence: All products that fail quality inspection must be removed from shelves.
exercises.translation: 所有未通過品質檢查的產品必須從架上移除。
